name: @iqbspecs/unit-metadata
author: IQB - Institut zur Qualitätsentwicklung im Bildungswesen
description: Specification for metadata as part of the unit data.

scripts.async_generate: asyncapi generate fromTemplate asyncapi.yaml @asyncapi/html-template --use-new-generator --param singleFile=false --param config=asyncapi.config.json -o ./spec --force-write
